CustomField.description: If linked to Buyer Service File, this will copy from the buyer's file when you click Sync Buyer/Seller Data. If there is no buyer Service File, enter manually and create a corresponding appraisal record to document the value at the time of transfer.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If linked to Buyer Service File, this will copy from the buyer's file when you click Sync Buyer/Seller Data. If there is no buyer Service File, enter manually and create a corresponding appraisal record to document the value at the time of transfer.
CustomField.label: Appraised Leasehold Value at Resale
